videos.title: Animating with CSS Transitions - A look at the transition properties
videos.description: Kevin Powell explores the four different transition properties, seeing what they do and how to use them with practical examples.

videos.title: Learn CSS Animation In 15 Minutes
videos.description: Covers both CSS transitions and keyframe animations with best practices, timing functions, and practical examples.

videos.title: CSS Animation Tutorial #4 - Keyframes
videos.description: Net Ninja tutorial covering keyframe-based CSS animations and how they relate to transition properties.

videos.title: Timing function tips to improve your css animations
videos.description: Short tips on animation timing functions including steps() and changing timing within keyframes for smoother transitions.
